version.name: 0.52-beta
version.author: Mantrika Sound
version.changelog:
v0.52-beta ChangeLog :
+ Wwise Tool: Core logic refactored to prioritize the Replace workflow; complete UI overhaul. + Architecture: Upgraded underlying framework to ensure zero crashes from REAPER version incompatibilities. + Mirror: Added auto-inheritance for region colors based on the parent Mirror track. + Segment Switch: Fully optimized algorithm to eliminate unusable audio fragments. + Qi: Enhanced randomization algorithm for greater variety. + Sample Broker: Added comprehensive state detection, improved OS drag-and-drop visuals, and integrated smart selection. + Loudness Meter: Optimized audio thread safety; implemented a custom loudness algorithm with refined playback detailing. + Selection Enhance: Streamlined performance by eliminating redundant API calls.
-- Mantrika Team -- 2026-04.11
